fixes.origin:
statement = (
    "SELECT id, agent_name, region, status, content_json "
    "FROM sync_jobs "
    "WHERE tenant = '" + tenant + "' "
    "AND region = '" + region + "' "
    "AND status = '" + status + "' "
    "ORDER BY created_at ASC "
    f"LIMIT {limit}"
)

cursor.execute(statement)
fixes.replacement:
statement = (
    "SELECT id, agent_name, region, status, content_json "
    "FROM sync_jobs "
    "WHERE tenant = ? "
    "AND region = ? "
    "AND status = ? "
    "ORDER BY created_at ASC "
    "LIMIT ?"
)

cursor.execute(statement, (tenant, region, status, limit))
